meaning: n.吸引力,(女人的)魔力,魅力,符咒vt.迷人,使陶醉,行魔法vi.用符咒,有魔力
examples: He exudes natural charm and good humour.
Cosy log cabins and romantic cottages with heated spas and open fireplaces continue the charm factor.
Again, the feature worked like a charm, and wasn't something we accidentally activated during normal play.
